Frontend Developer.question: Explain React Hooks.
Frontend Developer.modelAnswer: React Hooks allow functional components to use state and lifecycle features.

Frontend Developer.question: What is DOM?
Frontend Developer.modelAnswer: DOM stands for Document Object Model and represents HTML elements as objects.

Backend Developer.question: What is REST API?
Backend Developer.modelAnswer: REST API is an architectural style for communication between client and server using HTTP methods.

Backend Developer.question: Explain Flask.
Backend Developer.feedback: Practice Flask routing and backend concepts.
Backend Developer.modelAnswer: Flask is a lightweight Python web framework used for backend development.

Data Analyst.question: Explain SQL joins.
Data Analyst.feedback: Improve understanding of SQL joins and table relationships.
Data Analyst.modelAnswer: SQL joins combine rows from multiple tables using related columns.

Data Analyst.question: What is ETL?
Data Analyst.feedback: Learn ETL workflow and data pipelines properly.
Data Analyst.modelAnswer: ETL stands for Extract Transform and Load.

Full Stack Developer.question: Explain the difference between client-side rendering and server-side rendering.
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Improve understanding of rendering architecture in frontend systems.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Client-side rendering renders pages in the browser using JavaScript, while server-side rendering generates HTML on the server before sending it to the browser.

Full Stack Developer.question: How does React Virtual DOM improve performance?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Practice React rendering lifecycle and Virtual DOM concepts.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: React Virtual DOM updates only changed components instead of reloading the entire DOM, improving rendering efficiency and performance.

Full Stack Developer.question: Explain REST API architecture and why it is important in full stack applications.
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Improve API communication and architecture understanding.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: REST API architecture enables communication between frontend and backend systems using HTTP methods like GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE.

Full Stack Developer.question: How does JWT authentication work in web applications?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Practice secure authentication workflows and token handling.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: JWT authentication works by generating a signed token after login, which is verified on protected requests for secure user authentication.

Full Stack Developer.question: What are the advantages of MongoDB in MERN stack applications?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Improve NoSQL database and MERN architecture concepts.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: MongoDB provides flexible NoSQL document storage, scalability, and easy integration with JavaScript-based MERN stack applications.

Full Stack Developer.question: Explain the difference between Git and GitHub.
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Practice version control workflows and repository management concepts.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Git is a version control system used to track code changes, while GitHub is a cloud platform used to host and collaborate on Git repositories.

Full Stack Developer.question: How would you optimize the performance of a React application?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Improve understanding of React optimization techniques and rendering lifecycle.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: React performance can be optimized using memoization, lazy loading, code splitting, virtualization, and reducing unnecessary re-renders.

Full Stack Developer.question: What is middleware in Express.js?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Practice middleware flow and request-response lifecycle concepts.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Middleware in Express.js are functions that execute during the request-response cycle and can modify requests, responses, or control application flow.

Full Stack Developer.question: How do SQL and MongoDB differ?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Improve understanding of relational and NoSQL database systems.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: SQL databases use structured tables and relationships, while MongoDB stores flexible document-based NoSQL data.

Full Stack Developer.question: What are the steps involved in deploying a full stack application?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Practice application deployment workflows and production environment setup.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Deploying a full stack application involves preparing frontend and backend builds, configuring databases, setting environment variables, hosting services, and monitoring application performance.

Full Stack Developer.question: What is the purpose of useEffect in React?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Practice React lifecycle and side effect handling concepts.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: useEffect is used to handle side effects such as API calls, timers, subscriptions, and DOM updates in React functional components.

Full Stack Developer.question: Explain the difference between authentication and authorization.
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Strengthen understanding of application security workflows.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Authentication verifies user identity, while authorization determines what resources or actions the authenticated user can access.

Full Stack Developer.question: How does Express.js handle routing?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Practice backend route structuring and middleware flow.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Express.js handles routing using methods like app.get(), app.post(), app.put(), and app.delete() to process incoming requests.

Full Stack Developer.question: What are the advantages of component-based architecture in React?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Improve understanding of scalable frontend architecture.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Component-based architecture improves reusability, maintainability, scalability, and separation of concerns in frontend applications.

Full Stack Developer.question: How would you secure REST APIs in production applications?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Practice secure API development and authentication techniques.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: REST APIs can be secured using JWT authentication, HTTPS, input validation, rate limiting, CORS policies, and secure password hashing.

Full Stack Developer.question: What is normalization in SQL databases?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Improve database design and normalization concepts.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Normalization organizes database tables to reduce redundancy and improve data integrity.

Full Stack Developer.question: Explain asynchronous programming in JavaScript.
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Practice asynchronous workflows and promise handling.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Asynchronous programming allows JavaScript to execute tasks like API calls without blocking the main execution thread using callbacks, promises, and async/await.

Full Stack Developer.question: Why is Docker useful in full stack deployment?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Practice containerization and deployment workflows.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Docker helps package applications with dependencies into containers, ensuring consistent deployment across environments.

Full Stack Developer.question: What are React props and state?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Strengthen React component communication concepts.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Props are used to pass data between components, while state manages dynamic data inside a component.

Full Stack Developer.question: How would you improve the scalability of a full stack application?
Full Stack Developer.feedback: Improve system design and scalable architecture concepts.
Full Stack Developer.modelAnswer: Scalability can be improved using load balancing, caching, optimized database queries, microservices architecture, and cloud infrastructure.

Software Engineer.question: What is the difference between stack and queue data structures?
Software Engineer.feedback: Practice fundamental data structure concepts and real-world usage.
Software Engineer.modelAnswer: Stack follows LIFO order while queue follows FIFO order.

Software Engineer.question: Explain the four pillars of Object-Oriented Programming.
Software Engineer.feedback: Strengthen core OOP concepts and implementation understanding.
Software Engineer.modelAnswer: The four pillars of OOP are encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, and abstraction.

Software Engineer.question: What is normalization in DBMS?
Software Engineer.feedback: Improve database design and normalization concepts.
Software Engineer.modelAnswer: Normalization organizes database tables to reduce redundancy and improve data integrity.

Software Engineer.question: What is the purpose of operating systems?
Software Engineer.feedback: Practice operating system fundamentals and resource management concepts.
Software Engineer.modelAnswer: An operating system manages hardware resources and provides services for software applications.

Software Engineer.question: Explain time complexity and why it is important.
Software Engineer.feedback: Practice algorithm optimization and Big-O analysis concepts.
Software Engineer.modelAnswer: Time complexity measures the efficiency of an algorithm based on input size and helps evaluate performance scalability.

Software Engineer.question: What is a deadlock in operating systems?
Software Engineer.feedback: Strengthen operating system synchronization and process management concepts.
Software Engineer.modelAnswer: Deadlock occurs when multiple processes wait indefinitely for resources held by each other.

Software Engineer.question: What is the difference between process and thread?
Software Engineer.feedback: Practice process management and multithreading concepts.
Software Engineer.modelAnswer: A process is an independent executing program, while a thread is a lightweight execution unit inside a process.

Software Engineer.question: Explain inheritance in Object-Oriented Programming.
Software Engineer.feedback: Practice OOP relationships and reusable class design.
Software Engineer.modelAnswer: Inheritance allows one class to acquire properties and behaviors of another class.

Software Engineer.question: What is Big-O notation?
Software Engineer.feedback: Improve algorithm analysis and optimization understanding.
Software Engineer.modelAnswer: Big-O notation measures the worst-case time or space complexity of an algorithm.

Software Engineer.question: What is indexing in databases?
Software Engineer.feedback: Practice query optimization and database indexing concepts.
Software Engineer.modelAnswer: Indexing improves database query performance by allowing faster data retrieval.
